av_overview.Name: Vertiv Holdings Co
av_overview.Description: Vertiv Holdings Co designs, manufactures and services critical digital infrastructure technologies and lifecycle services for data centers, communication networks, and commercial and industrial environments in the Americas, Asia Pacific, Europe, the Middle East, and Africa. The company is headquartered in Columbus, Ohio.
av_overview.Address: 505 N. CLEVELAND AVE., WESTERVILLE, OH, UNITED STATES, 43082
